name: Potential Epic Activity
notes: This rule detects Turla Epic activity which searches for various terms within the victim system.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Filenames, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Log Filenames, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Search Terms
TD_list: APPLY Potential Epic Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Filenames, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Log Filenames, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Epic Search Terms
RED_list: Event description: Detects Turla Epic activity which searches for various terms within the victim system.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
